## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Tick the ones that apply. -->

- [ ] `dotnet build -c Release` succeeds locally
- [ ] Loaded the built DLL into a real Jellyfin server (10.11+) and verified the change in the browser
- [ ] If JS changed: tested in the browser with a hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R)
- [ ] If config schema changed: confirmed existing settings still load and Save still works
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
